title: CIRCE Cohort Expression Schema
description: Language-agnostic schema for OMOP CDM cohort definitions. This schema defines the data model for cohort expressions in the OHDSI CIRCE ecosystem. Implementers in any language should use this schema as the single source of truth.

CohortExpression.description: Main cohort expression class containing all cohort definition components. A CohortExpression defines a cohort by specifying primary entry events, inclusion rules, cohort exit strategy, and optional censoring.

Title.description: Human-readable title for the cohort definition

PrimaryCriteria.description: Criteria that define cohort entry events

AdditionalCriteria.description: Additional criteria applied to all cohort entry events

QualifiedLimit.description: Limit for qualifying events (events that pass additional criteria)

ExpressionLimit.description: Limit for the final cohort expression

InclusionRules.description: Rules that determine which qualifying events become cohort records

EndStrategy.description: Strategy for determining cohort end dates. Polymorphic: use {"DateOffset":{...}} or {"CustomEra":{...}}

CensoringCriteria.description: Criteria that censor (end) cohort episodes early

CollapseSettings.description: Settings for collapsing overlapping cohort episodes

CensorWindow.description: Window within which censoring criteria apply

PrimaryCriteria.description: Primary criteria that define cohort entry events. Each event is defined by a domain-specific criteria object (e.g. ConditionOccurrence, DrugExposure).

CriteriaList.description: List of domain-specific criteria wrapped in their type name

ObservationWindow.description: Observation window relative to the cohort index date

Criteria.description: Base criteria type. All domain-specific criteria inherit from this. In JSON, each criteria is serialized with a polymorphic wrapper: {"ConditionOccurrence": {...}}. The discriminator is the single key in the object.
Polymorphic base: each concrete type extends this with domain-specific fields and wraps in {"TypeName": {...}}

DateOffsetStrategy.description: Date offset end strategy. Defines cohort end as a fixed offset from a date field. Serialized in JSON as: {"DateOffset": {...}}

CustomEraStrategy.description: Custom era end strategy. Defines cohort end based on drug era persistence. Serialized in JSON as: {"CustomEra": {...}}

InclusionRule.description: An inclusion rule determines which qualifying events become cohort records. All rules must be satisfied (AND logic).

CriteriaGroup.description: A group of criteria combined with logical operators. Supports nested groups, demographic criteria, and occurrence counts.

Type.description: Logical operator: 'ALL' for AND, 'ANY' for OR, 'AT_LEAST' for count-based

CorelatedCriteria.description: A criteria with occurrence parameters and time windows. Associates a domain criteria with start/end windows and occurrence constraints. NOTE: The name 'Corelated' is deliberately misspelled to match the Java implementation.

WindowedCriteria.description: A criteria with time windows defining when it must occur relative to an index date.

Occurrence.description: Occurrence count parameters for correlated criteria. Defines how many times a criteria must occur (EXACTLY n, AT_MOST n, or AT_LEAST n).

DemographicCriteria.description: Demographic constraints for a criteria group. Filters based on patient demographics like age, gender, race, and ethnicity.

ConceptSet.description: A named set of concepts with an expression defining inclusion criteria.

id.description: Unique identifier referencing this concept set from criteria

ConceptSetExpression.description: Defines the inclusion criteria for a concept set, including explicit concepts and hierarchical relationships.

ConceptSetItem.description: An individual item within a concept set expression.

Concept.description: A concept from the OMOP standardized vocabulary.

ResultLimit.description: Specifies a limit type for qualifying events or the final expression.

Period.description: A time period with optional start and end dates.

DateRange.description: A date-based range filter with an operator, value, and optional extent.

NumericRange.description: A numeric range filter with an operator, value, and optional extent.

DateAdjustment.description: Adjusts start and end dates by a fixed offset, optionally switching to a different date type.

ObservationFilter.description: Defines the observation window around the index date for primary criteria.

CollapseSettings.description: Settings for collapsing overlapping cohort episodes into contiguous periods.

Window.description: A time window with start and end bounds relative to an index date.

WindowBound.description: A single bound of a time window, with a coefficient (before/after) and optional number of days.

TextFilter.description: A text-based filter with comparison operator.

ConceptSetSelection.description: Selects a concept set by ID, optionally as an exclusion.

DateType.description: Enumeration of date types used in DateAdjustment.

GeoCriteria.description: Base class for geographic criteria (extends Criteria).
